title: Daily Check-in
description: Deterministic daily check-in state. The tool updates local state; the model wraps the result in its own voice.
notes: Use when the user asks to sign in, check in, 打卡, or says they arrived in a check-in context.
Do not expose local storage paths.
The model may comment on the result, but must not invent points/streak/rank.

actions.description: Record today's check-in for one Telegram user.
